properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v3 v4 v6 v7 v8 v7 v3 v3 v8 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I feel walled in by my unbelief And miracles seem forever out of reach, I'll stand upon the words you've given me, 'Cause you wont relent till it's complete.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every word you've spoken Will surely come to pass, I believe you're moving And you're not finished yet.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Creator, healer, Wonder working miracle God, You can do anything, I know you're moving, I know you're working it out, So I will believe.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're not finished yet, You're not finished yet.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will be confident in you, oh Lord, I wont be swayed, By what I see right now, A glimmer of hope, Is breaking through the clouds, I know you'll see me through somehow.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When God opens a door No one can shut it No one can shut it No devil from hell can stop What God has started

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When God gives you a word, It's ever settled, It's ever settled, No devil from hell, Can block what God has promised.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: When God opens a door, No one can shut it, No one can shut it, No devil from hell, Can stop what God has started.
